projects.name: T4 Tea For U
projects.description: Premium boba shop site with cinematic food photography, menu showcase, and Folsom location finder.

issues.note: Hero photography feels iPhone-grade — need cinematic pro shots
Menu has no search/filter by type (milk tea, fruit, slush)

projects.nextAction: Replace hero image with pro cinematic boba shot

projects.name: Paws & Co Pet Shop
projects.description: Full-service pet shop with cinematic video hero, parallax depth gallery, and Three.js orb animations.

issues.note: Three.js orbs may hurt mobile performance — check FPS on low-end Android
No product catalog yet — visitors can't browse inventory

projects.nextAction: Audit mobile FPS with Three.js orbs — throttle if < 30fps

projects.name: Underground Reptiles
projects.description: Premium captive-bred reptile e-commerce with product grid, cart drawer, and atmospheric dark-gold styling.

issues.note: Cart drawer has no checkout flow — purely UI
Product grid needs category filters (snakes, lizards, geckos)

projects.nextAction: Wire cart drawer to Stripe checkout (or explicit 'contact to buy' flow)

projects.name: Emyies Shop
projects.description: Handcrafted wire-jewelry storefront with koi-themed slideshow and artisan brand storytelling.

issues.note: Product gallery is slideshow-only — no grid view for browsing
No About page with maker's story (this brand lives or dies on story)
Instagram feed integration would strengthen authenticity

projects.nextAction: Add product grid view alongside slideshow

projects.name: Trinh Media (HQ)
projects.description: Agency portfolio — cinematic video hero, signature color-shift theme, custom glowing cursor, and live-rendered project grid.

issues.note: No real testimonials yet — need 1–2 to earn their place on hero
Contact form has no backend — submissions go nowhere
Services section could show price tiers for anchoring

projects.nextAction: Wire contact form to email via Formspree / Resend
